negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_075
prompt: A dynamic gym scene unfolds in a well-lit space with a concrete wall accented by a blue stripe. A muscular, shirtless man with a defined physique is captured mid-exercise, lifting a black dumbbell above his head with his right arm bent at the elbow. He wears gray shorts, black socks, and white sneakers with black accents. His focused expression and tense muscles highlight the intensity of the workout. In the background, three individuals are seated on blue mats against the wall, attentively observing the exercise. One is wearing a gray shirt and a cap, another in a black jacket, and the third in a dark outfit. To the right, a white cabinet holds gym equipment, including a kettlebell and other items. A digital clock on the wall displays "0:16," indicating the time remaining for the workout session. The floor is covered with a dark mat, and various gym equipment, such as a green bag and a black bag, are scattered around the room. As the video progresses, the man transitions from lifting the dumbbell overhead to bending down and placing it on the ground. He then picks up the dumbbell again, preparing for the next repetition. The group of people in the background remains seated, watching attentively. One individual in a red shirt is seen standing near the back, possibly observing or waiting for their turn. The gym environment remains consistent throughout the sequence, with the same equipment and setup visible. In the final frame, the man is seen bending down and placing the dumbbell on the ground after completing another repetition. The group of observers continues to watch, and the gym setting remains unchanged, maintaining the same equipment and layout as in the initial frame.
